blocks.content: Hehe, so this boy makes my daughter nervous? The unshakable Amy of the Karmis family.
Although the Karmis family was known for its open-mindedness, Amy's personality was exceptionally bold.
It wasn't just her noble status that allowed her to subdue gangs since her childhood.
Her brothers seemed to think the same as they stared intently at Shirone.
They felt a twinge of jealousy, thinking that their sister, who never listened to them, was now paying attention to an outsider.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Here is Ares, my second older brother. And what he does is...
Amy, seemingly curious, asked instead.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: What exactly do you do, brother?

blocks.speaker: Ares
blocks.content: Hahaha! I'm an explorer. I excavate ruins and create maps while traveling through uncharted territories.
My notable works include the Dragon's Nest in the Alphones Mountains and the Crystal Caves at the northern limit of the Corona Kingdom.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Ah, I see. I know about the Alphones Mountains.
Known as a habitat for various dragons, the Alphones Mountains were filled with danger and adventure, often featured in literary works.
Rian had once mentioned while reading a novel titled 'Knight of the Dragon', that he wanted to visit the Alphones Mountains.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: That's really impressive. I heard it's a very dangerous place.

blocks.speaker: Ares
blocks.content: There's always a risk in romance. I'm satisfied with my job.
The pay is good if I succeed in mapmaking. Amy seems to dislike it, though.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Just shave that beard for once. You're not unemployed, yet you lock yourself up at home and don't go out for months.

blocks.speaker: Ares
blocks.content: Don't be too harsh. Anyway, I'll be joining an expedition team and won't be back for two years.
I've been waiting to see my beloved sister's face till now.
Hmph...
Amy turned her head away, dismissing the idea.
Shirone chuckled.
Despite her complaints about him being unemployed, she was actually worried about her adventurous brother.
Family members couldn't help but worry when his adventures often took more than a year, leaving them uncertain about his life or death.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Still, I think it's cool. I'd love to go on such an adventure someday.

blocks.speaker: Ares
blocks.content: Once you get into it, you can't get out.
It's something ordinary people can't experience in their lifetime.

blocks.speaker: Ares
blocks.content: Come find me after you graduate. I'll get you into an expedition team.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Oh, stop it! Stop filling his head with ideas and leave if the introductions are done.
As Amy dismissed them, her family began bombarding them with questions.
The interesting part was just beginning, and they couldn't possibly leave without starting it, could they?

blocks.speaker: Ares
blocks.content: But what about Amy do you like? You didn't cross the line set by the adults, did you?

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Uh? No, that's not...

blocks.speaker: Ares
blocks.content: What's your approach with Amy? She's not easy to deal with.
Did you sweet-talk her? Or did you man up and sneak a kiss in a secluded place?
Amy's eyes blazed red.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Didn't I tell you to leave?
In a rush, the room was suddenly empty except for Amy.
They had fled so hastily that the door was still shaking.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: I guess that's her personality at home.
The contrast to the previous chaos was stark with the room now eerily quiet.
Having missed his chance to speak, Shirone awkwardly looked around the room, feeling embarrassed.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Amy, pretending to drink her tea, hid her face and fell into thought.
The awkwardness was enough to make her sweat.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Why the hell did this guy come?
She had nothing to say. Even if there was an important matter, Shirone coming to her house was totally unexpected.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: What? If you've come, speak up! You didn't come just because you're bored.
Shirone shifted his gaze from the scenery back to Amy.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Ah, actually, I have a favor to ask.
But now that I'm here without prior notice, I feel it's rude. I apologize to your family.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: It's fine. What's so bad about visiting a friend's house? But what's this favor you mentioned?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Do you... have time to hang out? Like going to Galliant Island?
Amy froze, still holding her teacup.
The suggestion was beyond her expectations and imagination.
Shirone asking to hang out first. And with a girl. To an island, no less.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: So, you mean, you and I should go to the island together?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Actually, there's this friend, Rian.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: He suggested it first. He said he's bringing a friend along, so I need a friend to accompany me too. So, it's going to be the four of us.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Hoh? Is this friend Rian is bringing... a girl?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It seems so. Huh? How did you know?
Amy swallowed her tea without responding, quickly processing the situation in her mind.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: So it's basically a couple's trip. That sneaky Rian. Wait, a couple's trip?
A cold sweat ran down Amy's back.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: He's taking me there? Why?
Shirone, who had been unmoved even during their pretend relationship, suddenly proposing a couple's trip was baffling.
If it was just to make up numbers, he wouldn't have asked her.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: What's the reason for taking me? You have friends in the Advanced Class, right? You know I'm in the advanced class, right? And how much other advanced class students train during the holidays.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Then why me, of all people?
Amy asked the question but was afraid of the answer.
It couldn't possibly be what she was thinking.
Yet, it could be. Her hand trembled slightly as she brought the teacup to her lips.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Amy, I can't think of anyone but you.
Pffft!
Amy spat out all the tea she was drinking.
Shirone, sprayed with the tea, had a dazed expression like someone caught in a sudden shower.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: What are you even saying all of a sudden! You idiot, dummy!
Amy yelled as she wiped her mouth with her sleeve.
Her face red as a persimmon, she hurriedly left her seat to fetch a towel.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: ...You're the one who spat on my face. Anyway, continuing our conversation, do you remember Miro, whom I mentioned before?

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Miro? The founder of the Supernatural Psychic Science Research Group? You said you met her during the Immortal Function, right?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Right. I have a hypothesis that the Immortal Function is related to superluminal speed.
So, I wanted to learn more about her.
The headmaster said it would be okay to investigate the Kergos Ruins, so I was thinking of going there since Rian suggested it.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Aha, so you want to investigate it together?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I don't think it will be dangerous.
But from what the headmaster said, it's not just a simple tourist spot.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I would feel more at ease if you came along.
Since Rian proposed a double date, the partner had to be female.
But even apart from that, Amy was the strongest person Shirone knew among his friends.
Her unique abilities as a Red-Eye were a tremendous advantage, but her skills honed through daily competition with strong opponents had firmly placed her in the middle rank of the graduation class.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Hmph! Of course! I'm in a different league than those supernatural whatever kids.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: No, I didn't mean it that way, but anyway.
Shirone awkwardly smiled, trying to smooth over the situation.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Amy knew too well that Shirone wasn't the type to drag a friend into something just because they were strong.
Shirone had saved Amy from falling off a cliff.
That special incident had strengthened the trust between them.
That's why he could ask her.
Requesting her companionship despite knowing the risks was because of the bond they shared, having risked their lives together.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: So, that's what it is...
Amy walked over to the window, lost in thought.
The trip wasn't just the two of them, so there was no pressure.
In fact, she was rather excited to go.
There would be much to gain from this trip, but more than that, doing something with Shirone seemed fun.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: That kid, he does have an eye for things.
Alright, I owe him one, so this time I'll do him a favor.
Amy slowly turned around.
Seeing Shirone's anxious face waiting for her response, she couldn't help but smirk.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Regardless of the trip's purpose, it was essentially taking a girl out overnight.
Even if it was coated in sweet words, no girl would follow if the guy looked as tense as he did.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: He hasn't changed a bit since he was twelve.
When will this kid grow up? Maybe all his growth energy was focused on magic.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Okay, let's go to the island.

blocks.speaker: Tess
blocks.content: Hello! I'm Tess, a friend of Rian!
Tess greeted everyone heartily at the Ogent household.
Next to her, Rian stood with a nervous look.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: The reason Rian had been holed up at Shirone's house was to use Tess as a shield to storm his family home.
No parents would easily let their child, who came last in the swordsmanship academy, relax.
But it was different with a friend, especially if that friend was the top student and a model pupil from the swordsmanship academy.
It was calculated to work.

blocks.speaker: Tess
blocks.content: Hmm, I've heard about the fame of the Elzain house. How is your father doing?

blocks.speaker: Bischoff
blocks.content: He practices his sword every day without fail, even when he's stationed in the occupied territories.
In truth, Tess didn't know or care how her father was doing.

blocks.speaker: Bischoff
blocks.content: As expected of someone who made a name with the sword. I shall pay him a visit if I get a chance.
Tess's father, Elzain Baron, was a master swordsman known as 'The Flash'.
If Ogent swordsmanship was brutal, Elzain's was chilling and sharp.
Which was superior depended on the wielder, but the pride in maintaining the tradition of the sword was incomparable.

blocks.speaker: Tess
blocks.content: Rian, unlike you, you've found a fine girl.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: We're not dating. She's a friend.
Tess shot a sharp glance at Rian.
But what could she do? Thirsty people dig wells, and to go on this trip with Rian, she had to endure.

blocks.speaker: Tess
blocks.content: So, you want to go to Galliant Island for a vacation?

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Yeah. I thought I was going to die at the swordsmanship academy.
I need time to recover physically and mentally.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Oh, Shirone will be coming later too.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: We're leaving from here. Can I go?

blocks.speaker: Bischoff
blocks.content: It's fine for you to go, but did you really work hard?

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Haha! I thought you might say that, so I brought this.
I finally opened my Schema!

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Though the report card was taken by Reina, he had the certificate of passing the muscle strength test.
Although it was essentially useless paper since the placebo effect was revealed, Bischoff had no choice but to believe it, not knowing the whole story.

blocks.speaker: Bischoff
blocks.content: Hmm, you really passed. Congratulations.
Bischoff remained stoic as usual, but his voice trembled slightly.
Every parent worries more about their unsuccessful child.
To have achieved Schema, which he had struggled to succeed in, Bischoff must have been clenching his fists with pride.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Now, keep your promise.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: The sword Grandfather said he'd give me once I mastered Schema, I can take it now, right?

blocks.speaker: Bischoff
blocks.content: Of course.

blocks.speaker: Bischoff
blocks.content: Now that you've opened your Schema, you should start learning the Ogent swordsmanship.

blocks.speaker: Bischoff
blocks.content: But where is your report card? You seem confident, so it must be good.
